rows.notes: Year header clearly printed at top of page.
Section header, clearly legible handwriting. No amounts present.

rows.description: 10 per cent on Estate, Septr Div° 1880 to Deir 1881
rows.notes: Columns clearly aligned. Pounds column shows 6, shillings shows 19 (valid range), pence shows 3. Right margin annotation in darker ink appears to be a cross-check mark.

rows.description: 18 per cent on Boston Rent Buskey Div°
rows.notes: Values in valid range. Pence digit followed by what appears to be 'ob' (half-penny symbol), interpreted as 0.5. Column alignment slightly compressed but readable.
All digits clearly visible and in valid ranges. Column alignment confirmed by surrounding rows.
Abbreviation 'Do. Do.' (ditto, repeated from above). All values clearly visible and valid.
Appears to be a subtotal or intermediate total for a subsection. Handwriting compressed. Pence digit followed by what may be '2' and a fraction marker, interpreted as 2.5 pence (0.5 fraction).
Shillings value is 19 (at upper limit of valid range 0-19). Handwriting clear. Pence column shows 0.

Text contains reference '13.18.6 1/1' which appears to be a rate note rather than the amount itself. Pounds=8, shillings=6, pence=1 extracted from rightmost columns. Some ambiguity in whether all notations are part of description or mixed amounts.
Single word 'Bale' appears to be a structural marker or abbreviation. No clear amounts visible on this line. May be a continuation marker or section divider.

rows.description: 3 lots of Rooms at Helsey Dickinson. Balance of Rent
rows.notes: Handwriting clear and legible. Column alignment confirmed by well-defined vertical rulings. All values in valid ranges.
Description contains rate notation '£57.10' and fraction '3 ier s 1.14 4'. Extracted monetary amount 4-4-4 from rightmost columns. Description text is compressed and somewhat unclear.
Description includes '2.10 0' which may be a reference rate. The actual extracted amount from ledger columns is 4-0-0. Column alignment is clear.

rows.description: Jnt in £100 at 4 ie fent Augt 18.1881 9d
rows.notes: Description contains date 'Augt 18.1881' and note '9d'. Extracted amount 6-0-0 from monetary columns. 'd' notation is explanatory, not a fraction of this row's pence.

rows.description: Jnt on £150 at Do to April 1/1880 & Do
rows.notes: Description references 'April 1/1880'. All monetary columns clearly visible. Shillings and pence are both 0, which is valid. Pounds column shows 6.
Brief description. Pounds=12, shillings=3, pence=2 with apparent 'ob' (half-penny) fraction marker visible. All values valid. Column alignment clear.

rows.description: Jnt for one yr to Dornies for £300 by Burner
rows.notes: Clear handwriting. Contains rate reference '£300'. Extracted amount 15-0-0 from ledger columns. All values in valid ranges.

rows.description: Boston Rent moreity. Q cap if
rows.notes: Text is abbreviated/abbreviated. Pounds=1, shillings=14, pence=3. All values valid. Column position slightly compressed but readable.
Simple, legible description. Amounts clearly visible: 10-0-0. Round number suggests this may be a standard fee or fixed charge.
Clear column alignment. Pounds digit '1' clearly visible in first column followed by '22'. Shillings=15, pence=0. This is a substantial bank balance entry.
Ditto entries. Pounds=93, shillings=3, pence=4. All clearly visible and in valid ranges. Column alignment confirmed by surrounding entries.
Ditto entry. Pounds=46, shillings=19 (at maximum valid value), pence=8. All digits clearly positioned within their columns.

rows.description: Nork of the three Fonds [partially struck] Jor 7.4
rows.notes: Text appears partially struck or overwritten. Reference '7.4' in description. Extracted amount 347-4-0 from ledger columns. Shillings and pence clearly 4 and 0.

This appears to be a subtotal line for Canal Shares section. However, pence=19 exceeds valid range (max 11). Re-examined: may be '9' not '19'. Reviewing adjacent ink, most likely 9. Confidence reduced due to ambiguity.

rows.description: Is Johns Caling for Whitnam Road
rows.notes: Description appears to read 'Is Johns Calling for Whitnam Road' or similar. Amounts clearly visible: 10-0-0. Handwriting compressed but columns well-aligned.
Clear entry describing an allowance or permission. Amounts are clean round figures: 25-0-0. All columns clearly aligned.
Section header for 'Bonse Register' (possibly 'Bonus Register' or similar). Bold text treatment suggests structural label. No amounts present on this line.
Description text is compressed/abbreviated (possibly 'Clutter Bank'). Amounts clearly visible: 2-0-0. Handwriting somewhat rushed but column alignment is clear.

rows.description: total shown at bottom of page
rows.notes: Large total line at page bottom: 2390-0-4. This is clearly the final sum for the page. Four-digit pounds entry confirms column width. All values valid and well-aligned with ruling lines.
